summary: The diff implements all three requirements. REQ-1 is addressed via staleTime:0, gcTime:0, and refetchOnWindowFocus in useGetAllOrders. REQ-2 is addressed via refetchInterval:5000 (5 seconds, within the 10-15s range requested) with refetchIntervalInBackground:true. REQ-3 is addressed in backend/main.mo by sorting getAllOrders by timestamp descending and storing orders immediately in serviceOrders map on submitOrder. However, explicit cache invalidation on order submission is not implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: The admin order list should be invalidated and refetched automatically upon any new order submission.
missing_requirements.reason: No queryClient.invalidateQueries call for the allOrders key is present in the useSubmitOrder mutation onSuccess or in ServiceForm after a successful submission. Immediate invalidation triggered by the submission event is absent; only polling covers refresh.

hallucinated_features.description: A lastOrderTimestamp variable tracked in the backend actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not require tracking a last order timestamp. It is added to backend/main.mo but not used in any query endpoint described in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Live Auto-refreshing every 5s indicator with a pulsing green dot and Last updated timestamp in the AdminDashboard UI.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request any visual polling status indicator. This is an extra UI feature beyond the stated requirements.
